label: Washington, D.C.
sub: Federal capital — White House, Congress, Supreme Court

label: Kennedy Space Center
sub: Artemis II launch site — SLS/Orion liftoff Apr 1, 2026; historic home of Apollo and Space Shuttle programs

label: Milwaukee, WI
sub: ICE/USMS terror-financing arrest — Salah Salem Sarsour, Apr 2, 2026

label: New York, NY
sub: S&P 500 hit record 7,165.08 on Apr 24, 2026; home of NYSE and NASDAQ; Ground Zero of 9/11 attacks

label: Port of Los Angeles
sub: Major import gateway — impacted by Section 232 steel/aluminum tariffs effective Apr 6

label: Port of Houston
sub: Key petroleum and steel import hub — tariff impact zone; oil prices at ~$95–97/bbl after Hormuz crisis

label: El Paso Border Crossing
sub: Key southwest border sector — ICE FY2025: 442,637 deportations; 1M/year target set for FY2026–27

label: San Diego Splashdown Zone
sub: Artemis II splashdown Apr 10, 5:07 p.m. PDT — 'bullseye landing'; crew recovered by USS John P. Murtha

label: Joint Base Andrews, MD
sub: VP Vance departed for Islamabad Apr 11 — led 21-hr US-Iran talks that collapsed Apr 12; flew home without deal

label: US Supreme Court
sub: Trump immunity invocations: ~1/3 of emergency SCOTUS filings cite 2024 Trump v. US ruling; birthright citizenship oral args held Apr 1

label: The Pentagon
sub: DoD command for Hormuz blockade — 10,000+ troops deployed; struck by hijacked flight AA77 on Sep 11, 2001 (184 killed)

label: Naval Station Norfolk, VA
sub: Key deployment hub — USS George H.W. Bush (3rd carrier) deployed to Persian Gulf Apr 24; 12+ warships in Hormuz blockade

label: Richmond, VA
sub: Virginia redistricting amendment PASSED 51.5%–48.6% (Apr 22 results); circuit court blocked implementation; 8–10 House seats at stake

label: Menlo Park, CA
sub: Meta HQ — 10% workforce cut (~8,000 jobs) announced Apr 23; $115–135B AI capex guidance for 2026

label: Minneapolis, MN
sub: ICE officers killed US citizens Renee Good and Alex Pretti (Jan 2026); George Floyd killed here May 2020, triggering nationwide protests

label: Washington Hilton, DC
sub: WHCD shooting Apr 25–26: gunman Cole Allen arrested; Trump evacuated; one officer shot (body armor); suspect appeared to target Trump officials

label: Ground Zero / 9/11 Memorial
sub: WTC site — 2,977 killed Sep 11, 2001 in deadliest terror attack in US history; National September 11 Memorial & Museum opened 2014

label: Flight 93 National Memorial
sub: Shanksville, PA — United Airlines Flight 93 crashed here Sep 11, 2001 after passengers revolted; 40 passengers and crew killed; Capitol building saved

label: NSA Headquarters, Fort Meade
sub: National Security Agency HQ — 2013 Snowden disclosures revealed PRISM, XKeyscore, and bulk metadata collection programs; FISA 702 expires Apr 30, 2026

label: CIA Headquarters, Langley
sub: Central Intelligence Agency HQ — played central role in Bin Laden raid (2011), WMD intelligence failure (2003), and post-9/11 enhanced interrogation programs

label: Boston Marathon Finish Line
sub: Tsarnaev brothers bombed marathon Apr 15, 2013 — 3 killed, 264 injured; city locked down 4 days; deadliest domestic terror attack since 9/11 at that time

label: New Orleans, LA
sub: Hurricane Katrina Aug 29, 2005 — levee failures flooded 80% of city; 1,833 killed; 1M+ displaced; iconic symbol of federal disaster response failure

label: Las Vegas, NV — Route 91 Harvest
sub: Stephen Paddock killed 60, injured 411 from Mandalay Bay on Oct 1, 2017 — deadliest modern US mass shooting; FBI never established motive

label: Sandy Hook, Newtown CT
sub: 20 first-graders and 6 staff killed Dec 14, 2012; prompted Senate background check bill (failed 2013); Alex Jones fined $1.5B for defamation in 2022

label: Uvalde, TX — Robb Elementary
sub: 19 children and 2 teachers killed May 24, 2022; police delayed 77 minutes before breach; deadliest school shooting since Sandy Hook

label: Chicago, IL
sub: Third-largest US city; home of CME Group (world's largest futures exchange) and Federal Reserve Bank of Chicago; key manufacturing and logistics hub

label: San Bernardino, CA
sub: 14 killed, 22 injured in ISIS-inspired attack Dec 2, 2015; triggered landmark FBI-Apple encryption battle over iPhone passcode

label: Seattle, WA
sub: Home of Amazon (HQ), Boeing, Microsoft (Redmond); major tech and aerospace hub; impacted by steel/aluminum tariffs and AI investment boom

label: US Capitol
sub: Stormed Jan 6, 2021 by Trump supporters attempting to block Electoral College certification; 1,265+ charged; scene of $70B ICE budget reconciliation vote Apr 23, 2026

label: Houston Energy Corridor, TX
sub: HQ of ExxonMobil, Chevron, ConocoPhillips, and 400+ energy firms; WTI crude benchmarked here; oil near $95–97/bbl amid Hormuz crisis Apr 2026

label: Miami, FL
sub: Key swing state hub; home of Cuban American political constituency; SOUTHCOM headquarters; major immigration enforcement flashpoint under Trump second term
